arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo happy after Nottingham Forest claim first home win of season
arts.sum: Dean Henderson’s mistake from Chris Wood’s first-time strike gave Forest a first home league victory of the season.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner: ‘Palace keeper Dean Henderson tried to apologise for error in Nottingham Forest defeat’
arts.sum: Palace went close to taking the lead in the first half when Eddie Nketiah took aim from distance in the 19th minute, but his effort crashed off the outside of the right-hand corner of the goal. Forest eventually took the lead in the 65th minute when Trevoh Chalobah’s clearance fell to Chris Wood, who unleashed a half-volley past Dean Henderson.
Oliver Glasner has given his verdict on Crystal Palace’s defeat to Nottingham Forest on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Loss very frustrating and disappointing - Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner says his side's 1-0 loss at Nottingham Forest is "very frustrating and very disappointing".

arts.ttl: Wood strikes again to give Nottingham Forest 1-0 win over Crystal Palace
arts.sum: “We needed a home win and thankfully we got it,” Wood said. The goal capped a busy performance by Wood but Forest also owed a debt to keeper Matz Sels who made two excellent saves, first from a Eberechi Eze free kick after an hour and then from Jeffrey Schlupp with nine minutes remaining.

arts.ttl: Football fans rip into Aaron Ramsey's 'boring' cameo on Sky Sports after former Arsenal star made his presenting debut during Nottingham Forest's win over Crystal Palace
arts.sum: The former Arsenal star took centre stage for Sky Sports' Monday Night Football programme which showcased the evening match between Crystal Palace and Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Loss was very frustrating and very disappointing - Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's Oliver Glasner - Loss is frustrating and disappointing

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace’s winless run continues as Chris Wood goal earns Forest victory
arts.sum: Forest picked up a first win since their 1-0 victory over Liverpool in September.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest 1-0 Crystal Palace: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Chris Wood continues red-hot form
arts.sum: Chris Wood scores his fifth goal of the season to guide Nottingham Forest to a narrow 1-0 victory over Crystal Palace at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Dean Henderson drops clanger at worst possible time to hand Nottingham Forest victory
arts.sum: NOTTINGHAM FOREST 1-0 CRYSTAL PALACE: Dean Henderson apologised to the travelling fans as his blunder helped his former employers get one over his current, with pressure intensifying on Oliver Glasner
